---
name: Knowledge Asset Proposal
about: Propose a new RDF/Turtle asset for the Sovereign Registry.
title: "[PROPOSAL]: "
labels: enhancement, metadata
assignees: peculiarlibrary
---

**Asset Description**
What specific information or authority does this asset represent?

**DOI/Source**
Provide the Digital Object Identifier or the verifiable source of this data.

**Ontology Alignment**
Which existing PADI class does this asset belong to (e.g., padi:Registry, padi:Policy)?

**SHACL Readiness**
Does this data currently pass a local check against 'padi_core_shapes.ttl'?
